calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion An Motion To Compel Depositions
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Douglas J. Melton, Esq. of Long & Levit LLP, Tel. 415.397.2222, for defendants and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF LONNIE JACKSON's Motion To Compel Depositions is Denied. Under CCP section 2024.020, the discovery cutoff date was 30 days before the original trial date of December 9, 2013. Even assuming, as both parties do, that the applicable discovery cutoff date was January 31, 2014, the depositions sought to be compelled would occur beyond the discovery cutoff date, regardless of when they were first noticed. CCP section 2024.050 applies to plaintiff's motion, and plaintiff has not established the factors set forth in section 20204.050 so as to warrant the requested discovery. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Mtn To Compel Written Disco Responses
Off Calendar Dec-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ASHWIN LADVA, TEL. NO. 296-8844 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants SAW ENTERTAINMENT LTD and GARY MARLIN's Motion to Compel Written Discovery Responses and Appearance at Deposition is DENIED. Plaintiff LONNIE JACKSON has substantially complied by serving discovery responses on December 2, 2013, and appearing for deposition on November 22, 2013. Defendants' request for sanctions is DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
